channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-10644] sanity-pfl: test_10: @@@@@@ FAIL: /mnt/lustre/d10.sanity-pfl/file2 does not inherite root layout
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for Minh Diep <minh.diep@intel.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run:

https://testing.hpdd.intel.com/test_sets/46e6d8ce-0b90-11e8-bd00-52540065bddc

== sanity-pfl test 10: Inherit composite template from root ========================================== 04:32:33 (1517920353)
striped dir -i2 -c2 /mnt/lustre/d10.sanity-pfl
f1 expect=1[0,EOF]
f1 get   =1[0,EOF]
f2 expect=3[0,2097152][0x200000,16777216][0x1000000,EOF]
f2 get   =
 sanity-pfl test_10: @@@@@@ FAIL: /mnt/lustre/d10.sanity-pfl/file2 does not inherite root layout 
  Trace dump:
  = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:5327:error()
  = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/sanity-pfl.sh:414:test_10()
  = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:5603:run_one()
  = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:5642:run_one_logged()
  = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:5489:run_test()
  = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/sanity-pfl.sh:419:main()
Dumping lctl log to /home/autotest/autotest/logs/test_logs/2018-02-05/lustre-b2_10-sles12sp2-x86_64--full--2_17_1__72___e9ddaa45-e4f8-43fb-a3c8-6ede166648e6/sanity-pfl.test_10.*.1517920354.log
CMD: trevis-21vm1,trevis-21vm2,trevis-21vm3,trevis-21vm4,trevis-21vm5 /usr/sbin/lctl dk > /home/autotest/autotest/logs/test_logs/2018-02-05/lustre-b2_10-sles12sp2-x86_64--full--2_17_1__72___e9ddaa45-e4f8-43fb-a3c8-6ede166648e6/sanity-pfl.test_10.debug_log.\$(hostname -s).1517920354.log;
         dmesg > /home/autotest/autotest/logs/test_logs/2018-02-05/lustre-b2_10-sles12sp2-x86_64--full--2_17_1__72___e9ddaa45-e4f8-43fb-a3c8-6ede166648e6/sanity-pfl.test_10.dmesg.\$(hostname -s).1517920354.log
Resetting fail_loc on all nodes...CMD: trevis-21vm1,trevis-21vm2,trevis-21vm3,trevis-21vm4,trevis-21vm5 lctl set_param -n fail_loc=0 	    fail_val=0 2>/dev/null
done.
item.summary: sanity-pfl: test_10: @@@@@@ FAIL: /mnt/lustre/d10.sanity-pfl/file2 does not inherite root layout

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.

comments.comment:
sanity-pfl test 10 started failing for Lustre 2.10.3.15 in February 2018.

When 2.11.0 was created and b2_12 was forked, sanity-pfl test 10 continued to fail for all interop testing. Starting in April 2018, this test failed for interop testing between 2.11.0 clients and all 2.12.* servers, starting with 2.11.50.60.
Starting on 05 FEB 2021, this test started failing for 2.14.0 RC1 and RC2 servers and 2.12.6 clients.
